notes: New Flow nodes: .slimg (round-trip an image through the Image editor and back into your graph), LoRA Spec (FLUX LoRA weights), and Color Palette + Color Swatch. New BytePlus (Seedream) image provider. Google via Vertex now surfaces nano-banana image and Gemini text whenever you're signed in (including projects set via a GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT env var), and detecting/signing in auto-selects your project. Collapsed nodes keep their connections visible. Polish: node-category labels show on normal-width monitors, node titles wrap to two lines, and the Video workspace + Source Library are named consistently.
